wiki_nodes.description: Evergreen, interconnected pages detailing concepts, tools, and long-term projects.

entities.title: Netlify Partner Program Journey
entities.content: Evergreen documentation on the requirements, benefits, and architectural standards for becoming a Certified Netlify Partner. Tracks agency tier progress.

entities.title: 100 Websites in 30 Days
entities.content: A high-velocity frontend development challenge hosted at https://100websitesin30days.netlify.app/. Serves as the ultimate proof-of-work for prospective clients.

entities.title: Virginia Beach Local SEO Matrix
entities.content: A living document of ranking factors for Hampton Roads/VB. Focuses on Google Business Profile optimization, Schema markup, and fast Netlify edge-delivery.

blog_stories.description: Chronological stories, event-driven posts, updates, and personal developer narratives.

posts.title: Why I Built 100 Websites in 30 Days (And Hosted Them on Netlify)
posts.content_summary: A deep dive into the 100 Websites project. Discussing the CI/CD pipeline, overcoming builder fatigue, and why Netlify is my go-to for Jamstack.

posts.title: Solving the 'Get Booked' Problem for VB Specialty Shops
posts.content_summary: Many specialty businesses in Virginia Beach have great services but terrible booking flows. Here is how I use Netlify Serverless Functions to integrate seamless scheduling.

posts.title: My Journey to Becoming a Certified Netlify Partner
posts.content_summary: Announcing my intention to become a Certified Netlify Partner to bring enterprise-grade web speeds to Hampton Roads businesses.
